title: deschampsia cespitosa subsp. subtriflora
intro: Deschampsia cespitosa subsp. subtriflora, also known as Tufted Hair Grass, is a type of perennial grass native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant's extracts have been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving sleep quality, and acting as an antioxidant. Tufted Hair Grass can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, making it a popular ingredient in traditional medicine and natural remedies.
